clientMessages.author: davi_dinicio
clientMessages.content:
Hey <@803735937787756613> At this point, here’s what we have set up:
we have made the ad creatives (pictures, videos, scripts, etc)
the ads we created have been uploaded into Meta, and they will be running to the targeted locations we agreed on during the onboarding call
the CRM is set up, which is the software where all the incoming leads will be stored and communicated with.

Here’s all the information you need for now:

Make sure that you can log into the software, downloaded the app on your phone, and connected your calendar into the software. Here’s the instructions to do so (make sure to look at step 3)
https://www.notion.so/evolutesolutionsio/Account-Setup-1ff50a671a8f8036ba47e4ad879e096a?source=copy_link#1ff50a671a8f807dbb36f98540c1b962
https://www.notion.so/1ff50a671a8f8036ba47e4ad879e096a?pvs=21
Please read through this brief document that sets realistic expectations for what’s going to happen from here now that we’re launching everything
https://evolutesolutionsio.notion.site/Setting-Expectations-1ff50a671a8f8061a865d75f34e59972?source=copy_link
https://www.notion.so/1ff50a671a8f8061a865d75f34e59972?pvs=21
IMPORTANT - Lastly, please go through this tutorial on how to use the software. This is important to make sure we’re on the same page, and you understand how to use everything and exactly what’s going to happen with the leads (ex: what are we responsible for, what are you responsible for, etc)
https://evolutesolutionsio.notion.site/How-to-Use-the-Software-20050a671a8f8025905de484b7b534ec?source=copy_link
https://www.notion.so/20050a671a8f8025905de484b7b534ec?pvs=21

Once you’ve completed the above steps—logging into the CRM software, reviewing the expectations document, and completing the CRM tutorial—please send us a message to confirm that you’ve gone through them. If you have any questions about these materials, feel free to reach out. Thank you!
